intent: Score federal, subcontracting, and regulated-team opportunities for BosonIT based on fit, novelty, revenue potential, and delivery readiness.
category: ai-native opportunity and evidence operating system

intake.live_message: Fetched 100 normalized opportunities from the SAM public API.

notes: A personal SAM.gov API key is required.
Public/non-federal users may be rate-limited based on account role posture.
OpportunityOS keeps a seed fallback active until live SAM intake is available.

current_motion.lead_story: BosonIT is packaging federal opportunity intelligence, evidence automation, and secure mission rooms into one operator system that can be sold before full prime-contract eligibility arrives.
near_term_revenue_paths: opportunity qualification for small federal contractors
evidence and redaction automation for regulated teams
secure teaming and delivery rooms for contractor collaborations

workloads: requirement extraction from opportunities and attachments
semantic search over clauses, evidence, and prior responses
scored opportunity routing and agent orchestration
artifact storage for evidence and reviewer-ready proof
google.why_it_scales: OpportunityOS needs document ingestion, agent evaluation, retrieval, and scoring workloads that expand with each opportunity lane and evidence room.

aws.why_it_scales: AWS supports redundant document-processing and workflow paths for contractor and regulated-team deployments.

workloads: durable artifact storage for public proof and archives
fast operator interfaces and mobile-friendly event delivery
cloudflare.why_it_scales: Cloudflare can absorb public-facing opportunity ingestion, proof distribution, and edge-triggered workflow events without exposing the private operator room.

blockers: OPENAI_API_KEY is not present in the current runtime, so Sora and OpenAI speech stay in fallback mode.
creative_pipeline_status.best_primary_route: Chrome/Gemini for Google multimodal surfaces, local voice for narration drafts, Sora/OpenAI as premium fallback once API access is bridged.
